emails.body: Great! Just a heads up...Enron Company Policy prohibits employees from=20 trading the products that the company trades. Besides energy commodities= =20 (natgas, crude oil products, power), the company also trades interest rates= &=20 currencies, pulp paper, weather, plastics, and metals. I am sure they wi= ll=20 continue to expand this product base in the future. If you have any=20 questions about what you may or may not trade, please do not hesitate to ca= ll=20 me at x33399. =09Patricia Tlapek =0907/07/2000 08:06 AM =09=09 =09=09
